usize,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Claim a bead (atomic)\n    Claim {\n        /// Assignee (worker ID)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        assignee: String,\n\n        /// Model\n        #[arg(long)]\n        model: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Harness\n        #[arg(long)]\n        harness: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Harness version\n        #[arg(long)]\n        harness_version: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Initialize a new workspace\n    Init {\n        /// Issue prefix\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"bf\")]\n        prefix: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Sync (flush to JSONL or import from JSONL)\n    Sync {\n        /// Flush only (SQLite -> JSONL)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        flush_only: bool,\n\n        /// Import only (JSONL -> SQLite)\n        #[arg(long)]\n        import_only: bool,\n    },\n\n    /// Doctor - check and repair\n    Doctor {\n        /// Repair database\n        #[arg(long)]\n        repair: bool,\n    },\n\n    /// Count beads\n    Count {\n        /// Filter by status\n        #[arg(long)]\n        status: Option<String>,\n    },\n\n    /// Manage dependencies\n    #[command(subcommand)]\n    Dep(DepCommands),\n\n    /// Manage labels\n    #[command(subcommand)]\n    Label(LabelCommands),\n\n    /// Manage comments\n    #[command(subcommand)]\n    Comments(CommentsCommands),\n\n    /// Search beads\n    Search {\n        /// Search query\n        query: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by status\n        #[arg(short, long)]\n        status: Vec<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by type\n        #[arg(short, long)]\n        type_: Vec<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by assignee\n        #[arg(long)]\n        assignee: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by label\n        #[arg(short, long)]\n        label: Vec<String>,\n\n        /// Filter by minimum priority\n        #[arg(long, value_name = \"MIN\")]\n        priority_min: Option<i32>,\n\n        /// Filter by maximum priority\n        #[arg(long, value_name = \"MAX\")]\n        priority_max: Option<i32>,\n\n        /// Limit results\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"50\")]\n        limit: usize,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Show statistics\n    Stats {\n        /// Show breakdown by type\n        #[arg(long)]\n        by_type: bool,\n\n        /// Show breakdown by priority\n        #[arg(long)]\n        by_priority: bool,\n\n        /// Show breakdown by assignee\n        #[arg(long)]\n        by_assignee: bool,\n\n        /// Show breakdown by label\n        #[arg(long)]\n        by_label: bool,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Emit JSON Schema\n    Schema {\n        /// Schema target\n        #[arg(default_value = \"all\")]\n        target: String,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"json\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Configuration management\n    #[command(subcommand)]\n    Config(ConfigCommands),\n\n    /// Show velocity stats (bead-forge specific)\n    Velocity {\n        /// Model\n        #[arg(long)]\n        model: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Harness\n        #[arg(long)]\n        harness: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Output format (text, json)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n        format: String,\n    },\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum DepCommands {\n    /// Add a dependency\n    Add {\n        /// Issue ID (the one that will depend on something)\n        issue: String,\n\n        /// Target issue ID (the one being depended on)\n        depends_on: String,\n\n        /// Dependency type\n        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"blocks\")]\n        type_: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Remove a dependency\n    Remove {\n        /// Issue ID\n        issue: String,\n\n        /// Target issue ID to remove dependency to\n        depends_on: String,\n    },\n\n    /// List dependencies of an issue\n    List {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Show dependency tree rooted at issue\n    Tree {\n        /// Issue ID (root of tree)\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Tree direction (down, up, both)\n        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"down\")]\n        direction: String,\n\n        /// Maximum depth\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"10\")]\n        max_depth: usize,\n    },\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum LabelCommands {\n    /// Add label(s) to issue(s)\n    Add {\n        /// Issue ID(s) to add label to\n        #[arg(required = true)]\n        issues: Vec<String>,\n\n        /// Label to add\n        #[arg(short, long, required = true)]\n        label: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Remove label(s) from issue(s)\n    Remove {\n        /// Issue ID(s) to remove label from\n        #[arg(required = true)]\n        issues: Vec<String>,\n\n        /// Label to remove\n        #[arg(short, long, required = true)]\n        label: String,\n    },\n\n    /// List labels for an issue or all unique labels\n    List {\n        /// Issue ID (optional - if omitted, lists all unique labels)\n        id: Option<String>,\n    },\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum CommentsCommands {\n    /// Add a comment\n    Add {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n\n        /// Comment text\n        #[arg(required = true, num_args = 1..)]\n        text: Vec<String>,\n    },\n\n    /// List comments for an issue\n    List {\n        /// Issue ID\n        id: String,\n    },\n}\n\n#[derive(Subcommand)]\npub enum ConfigCommands {\n    /// List all config values\n    List,\n\n    /// Get a specific config value\n    Get {\n        /// Config key\n        key: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Set a config value\n    Set {\n        /// Config key\n        key: String,\n\n        /// Config value\n        value: String,\n    },\n\n    /// Show config file path\n    Path,\n}\n\npub fn run_cli() -> Result<Cli> {\n    Ok(Cli::try_parse()?)\n}\n\npub fn run(cli: Cli) -> Result<()> {\n    let workspace = cli.workspace.unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(\".\"));\n    let beads_dir = find_beads_dir(&workspace)\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace))?;\n\n    match cli.command {\n        Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n        Commands::Create { title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label } => {\n            cmd_create(&beads_dir, title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label)\n        }\n        Commands::List { status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, format } => {\n            cmd_list(&beads_dir, status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Show { id, format } => cmd_show(&beads_dir, &id, &format),\n        Commands::Update { id, title, status, priority, assignee } => {\n            cmd_update(&beads_dir, &id, title, status, priority, assignee)\n        }\n        Commands::Close { id, reason } => cmd_close(&beads_dir, &id, &reason),\n        Commands::Reopen { id } => cmd_reopen(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Delete { id } => cmd_delete(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Ready { limit, format } => cmd_ready(&beads_dir, limit, &format),\n        Commands::Claim { assignee, model, harness, harness_version, format } => {\n            cmd_claim(&beads_dir, &assignee, model, harness, harness_version, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Sync { flush_only, import_only } => cmd_sync(&beads_dir, flush_only, import_only),\n        Commands::Doctor { repair } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n        Commands::Dep(dep_cmd) => cmd_dep(&beads_dir, dep_cmd),\n        Commands::Label(label_cmd) => cmd_label(&beads_dir, label_cmd),\n        Commands::Comments(comments_cmd) => cmd_comments(&beads_dir, comments_cmd),\n        Commands::Search { query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, format } => {\n            cmd_search(&beads_dir, query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Stats { by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, format } => {\n            cmd_stats(&beads_dir, by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Schema { target, format } => cmd_schema(&target, &format),\n        Commands::Config(config_cmd) => cmd_config(&beads_dir, config_cmd),\n        Commands::Velocity { model, harness, format } => cmd_velocity(&beads_dir, model, harness, &format),\n    }\n}\n\nfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n\n    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n    if !config_path.exists() {\n        let config = format!(\n            r#\"issue_prefixes: [{}]\ndefault_priority: 2\ndefault_type: task\nclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n\"#,\n            prefix\n        );\n        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n    }\n\n    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n        let metadata = r#\"{\"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\"}\"#;\n        std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n    }\n\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let gitignore_path = beads_dir.join(\".gitignore\");\n    if !gitignore_path.exists() {\n        std::fs::write(&gitignore_path, \"beads.db\\nbeads.db-shm\\nbeads.db-wal\\n\")?;\n    }\n\n    println!(\"Initialized bead-forge workspace in {:?}\", beads_dir);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_create(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    title: String,\n    type_: String,\n    priority: i32,\n    description: Option<String>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n    labels: Vec<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n    let prefix = get_default_prefix(&config);\n    let id = crate::id::generate_id(prefix, count);\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    let mut issue = Issue::new(id.clone(), title, \".\".to_string());\n    issue.issue_type = IssueType::from_str(type_.as_str())?;\n    issue.priority = Priority(priority);\n    issue.description = description;\n    issue.assignee = assignee;\n    issue.labels = labels;\n\n    storage.create_issue(&issue)?;\n\n    println!(\"{}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_list(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    type_: Option<String>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n    if let Some(s) = status {\n        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str())?);\n    }\n    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str())?);\n    }\n    filter.assignee = assignee;\n    filter.priority = priority;\n    filter.limit = limit;\n\n    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issue)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} - {} ({})\", issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&issue)?);\n        }\n        _ => {\n            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n            }\n            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n            }\n            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n            }\n            if !issue.dependencies.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"Dependencies:\");\n                for dep in &issue.dependencies {\n                    println!(\"  - {} ({})\", dep.depends_on_id, dep.dep_type);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_update(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    id: &str,\n    title: Option<String>,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut changes = IssueChanges {\n        title,\n        status: status.as_ref().and_then(|s| Status::from_str(s).ok()),\n        priority,\n        assignee,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.close_issue(id, reason, \"cli\")?;\n    println!(\"Closed bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_reopen(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let changes = IssueChanges {\n        status: Some(Status::Open),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [id])?;\n        Ok(())\n    })?;\n\n    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n    filter.status = Some(Status::Open);\n    filter.limit = Some(limit);\n\n    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issue)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} - {} ({})\", issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_claim(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    assignee: &str,\n    _model: Option<String>,\n    _harness: Option<String>,\n    _harness_version: Option<String>,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n    let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now())\n    })?;\n\n    match result {\n        Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed }) => {\n            match format {\n                \"json\" => {\n                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n                        \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                        \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                        \"assignee\": assignee\n                    });\n                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n                }\n                _ => {\n                    println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        None => {\n            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_sync(beads_dir: &PathBuf, flush_only: bool, import_only: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if import_only {\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Imported {} beads\", result.imported);\n    } else if flush_only {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Flushed {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    } else {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Synced {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_doctor(beads_dir: &PathBuf, repair: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n\n    if repair {\n        std::fs::remove_file(&db_path)?;\n        let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Repaired database: imported {} beads from JSONL\", result.imported);\n    } else {\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n        println!(\"Database is healthy: {} beads\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_count(beads_dir: &PathBuf, status: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = if let Some(s) = status {\n        let filter = IssueFilter {\n            status: Some(Status::from_str(&s)?),\n            ..Default::default()\n        };\n        storage.list_issues(&filter)?.len()\n    } else {\n        storage.count_issues()?\n    };\n\n    println!(\"{}\", count);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_dep(beads_dir: &PathBuf, cmd: DepCommands) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    match cmd {\n        DepCommands::Add { issue, depends_on, type_ } => {\n            let dep_type = DependencyType::from_str(&type_)?;\n            storage.add_dependency(&issue, &depends_on, &dep_type, \"cli\")?;\n            println!(\"Added dependency: {} depends on {} ({})\", issue, depends_on, type_);\n        }\n        DepCommands::Remove { issue, depends_on } => {\n            storage.remove_dependency(&issue, &depends_on)?;\n            println!(\"Removed dependency: {} -> {}\", issue, depends_on);\n        }\n        DepCommands::List { id } => {\n            let deps = storage.get_dependencies(&id)?;\n            if deps.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"No dependencies found for {}\", id);\n            } else {\n                println!(\"Dependencies of {}:\", id);\n                for dep in deps {\n                    println!(\"  - {} ({})\", dep.depends_on_id, dep.dep_type);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        DepCommands::Tree { id, direction, max_depth } => {\n            print_dep_tree(&storage, &id, &direction, 0, max_depth)?;\n        }\n    }\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn print_dep_tree(storage: &Storage, id: &str, direction: &str, depth: usize, max_depth: usize) -> Result<()> {\n    if depth > max_depth {\n        return Ok(());\n    }\n\n    let indent = \"  \".repeat(depth);\n    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?;\n    match issue {\n        Some(i) => println!(\"{}[{}] {} {}\", indent, id, i.status, i.title),\n        None => println!(\"{}[{}] (not found)\", indent, id),\n    }\n\n    let deps = match direction {\n        \"up\" => storage.get_dependents(id)?,\n        _ => storage.get_dependencies(id)?,\n    };\n\n    for dep in deps {\n        let next_id = match direction {\n            \"up\" => dep.issue_id,\n            _ => dep.depends_on_id,\n        };\n        print_dep_tree(storage, &next_id, direction, depth + 1, max_depth)?;\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_label(beads_dir: &PathBuf, cmd: LabelCommands) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    match cmd {\n        LabelCommands::Add { issues, label } => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                storage.add_label(&issue, &label)?;\n                println!(\"Added label '{}' to {}\", label, issue);\n            }\n        }\n        LabelCommands::Remove { issues, label } => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                storage.remove_label(&issue, &label)?;\n                println!(\"Removed label '{}' from {}\", label, issue);\n            }\n        }\n        LabelCommands::List { id } => {\n            if let Some(issue_id) = id {\n                let labels = storage.get_labels(&issue_id)?;\n                if labels.is_empty() {\n                    println!(\"No labels found for {}\", issue_id);\n                } else {\n                    println!(\"Labels for {}:\", issue_id);\n                    for label in labels {\n                        println!(\"  - {}\", label);\n                    }\n                }\n            } else {\n                let all_labels = storage.list_all_labels()?;\n                if all_labels.is_empty() {\n                    println!(\"No labels found\");\n                } else {\n                    println!(\"All labels:\");\n                    for (label, count) in all_labels {\n                        println!(\"  - {} ({})\", label, count);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_comments(beads_dir: &PathBuf, cmd: CommentsCommands) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    match cmd {\n        CommentsCommands::Add { id, text } => {\n            let comment_text = text.join(\" \");\n            storage.add_comment(&id, \"cli\", &comment_text)?;\n            println!(\"Added comment to {}\", id);\n        }\n        CommentsCommands::List { id } => {\n            let comments = storage.list_comments(&id)?;\n            if comments.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"No comments found for {}\", id);\n            } else {\n                println!(\"Comments for {}:\", id);\n                for comment in comments {\n                    println!(\"  [{}] {}: {}\", comment.id, comment.author, comment.body);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_search(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    query: Option<String>,\n    status: Vec<String>,\n    type_: Vec<String>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n    labels: Vec<String>,\n    priority_min: Option<i32>,\n    priority_max: Option<i32>,\n    limit: usize,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let status_filter: Vec<Status> = status.iter().filter_map(|s| Status::from_str(s).ok()).collect();\n    let type_filter: Vec<IssueType> = type_.iter().filter_map(|t| IssueType::from_str(t).ok()).collect();\n\n    let issues = storage.search_issues(\n        query.as_deref(),\n        &status_filter,\n        &type_filter,\n        assignee.as_deref(),\n        &labels,\n        priority_min,\n        priority_max,\n        limit,\n    )?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"{}\", beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n    if let Some(s) = status {\n        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    filter.assignee = assignee;\n    filter.priority = priority;\n    filter.limit = limit;\n\n    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issue)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} - {} ({})\", issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&issue)?);\n        }\n        _ => {\n            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n            }\n            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n            }\n            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_update(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    id: &str,\n    title: Option<String>,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut changes = IssueChanges {\n        title,\n        status: status.map(|s| Status::from_str(&s).ok()).flatten(),\n        priority,\n        assignee,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.close_issue(id, reason, \"cli\")?;\n    println!(\"Closed bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_reopen(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let changes = IssueChanges {\n        status: Some(Status::Open),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n        Ok(())\n    })?;\n\n    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n    filter.status = Some(Status::Open);\n    filter.limit = Some(limit);\n\n    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issue)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} - {} ({})\", issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_claim(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    assignee: &str,\n    _model: Option<String>,\n    _harness: Option<String>,\n    _harness_version: Option<String>,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n    let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now())\n    })?;\n\n    match result {\n        Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed }) => {\n            match format {\n                \"json\" => {\n                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n                        \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                        \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                        \"assignee\": assignee\n                    });\n                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n                }\n                _ => {\n                    println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        None => {\n            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_sync(beads_dir: &PathBuf, flush_only: bool, import_only: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if import_only {\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Imported {} beads\", result.imported);\n    } else if flush_only {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Flushed {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    } else {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Synced {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_doctor(beads_dir: &PathBuf, repair: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n\n    if repair {\n        std::fs::remove_file(&db_path)?;\n        let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Repaired database: imported {} beads from JSONL\", result.imported);\n    } else {\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n        println!(\"Database is healthy: {} beads\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_count(beads_dir: &PathBuf, status: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = if let Some(s) = status {\n .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace))?;\n241\t\n242\t    match cli.command {\n243\t        Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n244\t Commands::Sync { flush_only, import_only } => cmd_sync(&beads_dir, flush_only, import_only),\n262\t        Commands::Doctor { repair } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n263\t        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n264\t        Commands::Batch { file, json, stdin } => cmd_batch(&beads_dir, file, json, stdin),\n265\t    }\n266\t}\n267\t\n268\tfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n269\t    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n270\t\n271\t    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n272\t    if !config_path.exists() {\n273\t );\n281\t        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n282\t    }\n283\t\n284\t    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n285\t    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n286\t        let Ok(())\n300\t}\n301\t\n302\tfn cmd_create(\n303\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n304\t    title: String,\n305\t    type_: String,\n306\t    priority: i32,\n307\t    description: Option<String>,\n308\t get_default_prefix(&config);\n318\t    let id = crate::id::generate_id(prefix, count);\n319\t\n320\t    let now = Utc::now();\n321\t    let mut issue = Issue::new(id.clone(), title, \".\".to_string());\n322\t    issue.issue_type = IssueType::from_str(type_.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?;\n323\t    issue.priority = Priority(priority);\n324\t    issue.description = description;\n325\t    issue.assignee = assignee;\n326\t    issue.labels = labels;\n327\t\n328\t    storage.create_issue(&issue)?;\n329\t\n330\t    println!(\"{}\", id);\n331\t    Ok(())\n332\t}\n333\t\n334\tfn cmd_list(\n335\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n336\t    status: Option<String>,\n337\t    type_: Option<String>,\n338\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n339\t    priority: beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n345\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n346\t\n347\t    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n348\t    if let Some(s) = status {\n349\t Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n353\t    }\n354\t    filter.assignee = assignee;\n355\t    filter.priority = priority;\n356\t    filter.limit = issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n369\t            }\n370\t        }\n371\t    }\n372\t\n373\t    Ok(())\n374\t}\n375\t\n376\tfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n377\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n378\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n379\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n380\t\n381\t    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n382\t\n383\t    match format {\n384\t        \"json\" => {\n385\t            println!(\"{}\", println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n391\t            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n392\t            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n393\t            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n394\t                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n395\t            }\n396\t            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n397\t                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n398\t            }\n399\t            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n400\t                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n401\t            }\n402\t        }\n403\t    }\n404\t\n405\t    Ok(())\n406\t}\n407\t\n408\tfn cmd_update(\n409\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n410\t    id: &str,\n411\t    title: Option<String>,\n412\t    status: Option<String>,\n413\t    priority: Option<i32>,\n414\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n415\t) -> Result<()> {\n416\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n417\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n418\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n419\t\n420\t    let mut changes = IssueChanges {\n421\t        title,\n422\t        status: status.map(|s| println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n430\t    Ok(())\n431\t}\n432\t\n433\tfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n434\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n435\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n436\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n437\t\n438\t    storage.close_issue(id, reason, \"cli\")?;\n439\t    println!(\"Closed bead {}\", id);\n440\t    Ok(())\n441\t}\n442\t\n443\tfn cmd_reopen(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n444\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n445\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n446\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n447\t\n448\t    let changes = IssueChanges {\n449\t        status: Some(Status::Open),\n450\t        ..Default::default()\n451\t    };\n452\t\n453\t    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n454\t    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n455\t    Ok(())\n456\t}\n457\t\n458\tfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n459\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n460\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n461\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n462\t\n463\t    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n464\t        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n        Ok(())\n    })?;\n\n    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n    })?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _               candidate.downstream_impact, candidate.critical_float);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_claim(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    assignee: &str,\n    _model: Option<String>,\n    _harness: Option<String>,\n    _harness_version: Option<String>,\n    dry_run: bool,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let without actually claiming\n        let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n        })?;\n\n        if let Some(candidate) = candidates.first() {\n            match format {\n                \"json\" => {\n                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n                        \"title\": candidate.title,\n                        \"priority\": candidate.priority,\n                        \"downstream_impact\": candidate.downstream_impact,\n                        \"critical_float\": candidate.critical_float,\n                        \"assignee\": assignee,\n                        \"dry_run\": true\n                    });\n                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n                }\n                _ => {\n                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={})\", candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact);\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n        }\n    } else {\n        let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now())\n        })?;\n\n        match result {\n            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed }) => {\n                match format {\n                    \"json\" => {\n                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                            \"assignee\": assignee\n                        });\n                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n                    }\n                    _ => {\n                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            None => {\n                println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_sync(beads_dir: &PathBuf, flush_only: bool, import_only: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if import_only {\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Imported {} beads\", result.imported);\n    } else if flush_only {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Flushed {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    } else {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Synced {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_doctor(beads_dir: &PathBuf, repair: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n\n    if repair {\n        std::fs::remove_file(&db_path)?;\n        let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n        let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Repaired database: imported {} beads from JSONL\", result.imported);\n    } else {\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n        println!(\"Database is healthy: {} beads\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_count(beads_dir: &PathBuf, status: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = if let Some(s) = status {\n        let filter = IssueFilter {\n            status: Some(Status::from_str(&s).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?),\n            ..Default::default()\n        };\n        storage.list_issues(&filter)?.len()\n    } else {\n        storage.count_issues()?\n    };\n\n    println!(\"{}\", count);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_batch(beads_dir: &PathBuf, file: Option<PathBuf>, json: Option<String>, stdin: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let ops: Vec<BatchOp> = if let Some(json_str) = json {\n        serde_json::from_str(&json_str)?\n    } else if let Some(file_path) = file {\n        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&file_path)?;\n        serde_json::from_str(&content)?\n    } else if stdin {\n        parse_stdin()?\n    } else {\n        return Err(anyhow!(\"Must provide --file, --json, or --stdin\"));\n    };\n\n    let results = execute_batch(&storage, ops, beads_dir)?;\n\n    // Print results\n    for result in results {\n        if result.status == \"ok\" {\n            if let Some(id) = result.id {\n                println!(\"[op {}] ok: {}\", result.op, id);\n            } else {\n                println!(\"[op {}] ok\", result.op);\n            }\n        } else {\n },\n}\n\npub fn run_cli() -> Result<Cli> {\n    Ok(Cli::try_parse()?)\n}\n\npub fn run(cli: Cli) -> Result<()> {\n    let workspace = cli.workspace.unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(\".\"));\n\n    // For init command, we allow the .beads directory to not exist yet\n    match &cli.command {\n        Commands::Init { .. } => {\n            let beads_dir = workspace.join(\".beads\");\n            return match cli.command {\n                Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n                _ => unreachable!(),\n            };\n        }\n        _ => {}\n    }\n\n    let beads_dir = find_beads_dir(&workspace)\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace))?;\n\n    match cli.command {\n        Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n        Commands::Create { title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label } => {\n            cmd_create(&beads_dir, title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label)\n        }\n        Commands::List { status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, format } => {\n            cmd_list(&beads_dir, status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Show { id, format } => cmd_show(&beads_dir, &id, &format),\n        Commands::Update { id, title, status, priority, assignee } => {\n            cmd_update(&beads_dir, &id, title, status, priority, assignee)\n        }\n        Commands::Close { id, reason } => cmd_close(&beads_dir, &id, &reason),\n        Commands::Reopen { id } => cmd_reopen(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Delete { id } => cmd_delete(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Ready { limit, format } => cmd_ready(&beads_dir, limit, &format),\n        Commands::Claim { assignee, model, harness, harness_version, dry_run, format } => {\n            cmd_claim(&beads_dir, &assignee, model, harness, harness_version, dry_run, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Sync { flush_only, import_only } => cmd_sync(&beads_dir, flush_only, import_only),\n        Commands::Doctor { repair } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n        Commands::Batch { file, json, stdin } => cmd_batch(&beads_dir, file, json, stdin),\n    }\n}\n\nfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n\n    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n    if !config_path.exists() {\n        let config = format!(\n            r#\"issue_prefixes: [{}]\ndefault_priority: 2\ndefault_type: task\nclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n\"#,\n            prefix\n        );\n        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n    }\n\n    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n        let metadata = r#\"{\"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\"}\"#;\n        std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n    }\n\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let gitignore_path = beads_dir.join(\".gitignore\");\n    if !gitignore_path.exists() {\n        std::fs::write(&gitignore_path, \"beads.db\\nbeads.db-shm\\nbeads.db-wal\\n\")?;\n    }\n\n    println!(\"Initialized bead-forge workspace in {:?}\", beads_dir);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_create(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    title: String,\n    type_: String,\n    priority: i32,\n    description: Option<String>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n    labels: Vec<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n    let prefix = get_default_prefix(&config);\n    let id = crate::id::generate_id(prefix, count);\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    let mut issue = Issue::new(id.clone(), title, \".\".to_string());\n    issue.issue_type = IssueType::from_str(type_.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?;\n    issue.priority = Priority(priority);\n    issue.description = description;\n    issue.assignee = assignee;\n    issue.labels = labels;\n\n    storage.create_issue(&issue)?;\n\n    println!(\"{}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_list(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    type_: Option<String>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n    if let Some(s) = status {\n        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    filter.assignee = assignee;\n    filter.priority = priority;\n    filter.limit = limit;\n\n    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issue)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} - {} ({})\", issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&issue)?);\n        }\n        _ => {\n            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n            }\n            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n            }\n            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_update(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    id: &str,\n    title: Option<String>,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut changes = IssueChanges {\n        title,\n        status: status.map(|s| Status::from_str(&s).ok()).flatten(),\n        priority,\n        assignee,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.close_issue(id, reason, \"cli\")?;\n    println!(\"Closed bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_reopen(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let changes = IssueChanges {\n        status: Some(Status::Open),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n        Ok(())\n    })?;\n\n    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n    })?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} (priority={}, impact={}, float={})\",\n                    candidate.id, candidate.title, candidate.priority,\n                    candidate.downstream_impact, candidate.critical_float);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_claim(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    assignee: &str,\n    _model: Option<String>,\n    _harness: Option<String>,\n    _harness_version: Option<String>,\n    dry_run: bool,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if dry_run {\n        // Show what would be claimed without actually claiming\n        let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n        })?;\n\n        if let Some(candidate) = candidates.first() {\n            match format {\n                \"json\" => {\n                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n                        \"title\": candidate.title,\n                        \"priority\": candidate.priority,\n                        \"downstream_impact\": candidate.downstream_impact,\n                        \"critical_float\": candidate.critical_float,\n                        \"assignee\": assignee,\n                        \"dry_run\": true\n                    });\n                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n                }\n                _ => {\n                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={})\", candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact);\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n        }\n    } else {\n        let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now())\n        })?;\n\n        match result {\n            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed }) => {\n                match format {\n                    \"json\" => {\n                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                            \"assignee\": assignee\n                        });\n                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n                    }\n                    _ => {\n                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            None => {\n                println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_sync(beads_dir: &PathBuf, flush_only: bool, import_only: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if import_only {\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Imported {} beads\", result.imported);\n    } else if flush_only {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Flushed {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    } else {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Synced {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_doctor(beads_dir: &PathBuf, repair: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n\n    if repair {\n        std::fs::remove_file(&db_path)?;\n        let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n        let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Repaired database: imported {} beads from JSONL\", result.imported);\n    } else {\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n        println!(\"Database is healthy: {} beads\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_count(beads_dir: &PathBuf, status: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = if let Some(s) = status {\n        let filter = IssueFilter {\n            status: Some(Status::from_str(&s).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?),\n            ..Default::default()\n        };\n        storage.list_issues(&filter)?.len()\n    } else {\n        storage.count_issues()?\n    };\n\n    println!(\"{}\", count);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_batch(beads_dir: &PathBuf, file: Option<PathBuf>, json: Option<String>, stdin: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let ops: Vec<BatchOp> = if let Some(json_str) = json {\n        serde_json::from_str(&json_str)?\n    } else if let Some(file_path) = file {\n        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&file_path)?;\n        serde_json::from_str(&content)?\n    } else if stdin {\n        parse_stdin()?\n    } else {\n        return Err(anyhow!(\"Must provide --file, --json, or --stdin\"));\n    };\n\n    let results = execute_batch(&storage, ops, beads_dir)?;\n\n    // Print results\n    for result in results {\n        if result.status == \"ok\" {\n            if let Some(id) = result.id {\n                println!(\"[op {}] ok: {}\", result.op, id);\n            } else {\n                println!(\"[op {}] ok\", result.op);\n            }\n        } else {\n cmd_list(&beads_dir, status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Show { id, format } => cmd_show(&beads_dir, &id, &format),\n        Commands::Update { id, title, &reason),\n        Commands::Reopen { id } => cmd_reopen(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Delete { id } => cmd_delete(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Ready { limit, format } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n        Commands::Batch { file, json, stdin } => cmd_batch(&beads_dir, file, json, stdin),\n    }\n}\n\nfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n\n    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n    if !config_path.exists() std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n    }\n\n    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n        let metadata = r#\"{\"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\"}\"#;\n        std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n    }\n\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n    let prefix = get_default_prefix(&config);\n    let assignee: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n    if let Some(s) = status {\n        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    filter.assignee = assignee;\n    filter.priority = priority;\n    filter.limit = limit;\n\n    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issue)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} - {} ({})\", issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&issue)?);\n        }\n        _ => {\n            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n            }\n            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n            }\n            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_update(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    id: &str,\n    title: Option<String>,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut changes = IssueChanges {\n        title,\n        status: status.map(|s| Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let changes = IssueChanges {\n        status: Some(Status::Open),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n        Ok(())\n    })?;\n\n    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n    })?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} (priority={}, impact={}, float={})\",\n                    candidate.id, candidate.title, candidate.priority,\n                    candidate.downstream_impact, candidate.critical_float);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_claim(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    assignee: &str,\n    _model: Option<String>,\n    _harness: Option<String>,\n    _harness_version: Option<String>,\n    dry_run: bool,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if dry_run {\n        // Show what would be claimed without actually claiming\n        let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n        })?;\n\n        if let Some(candidate) = candidates.first() {\n            match format {\n                \"json\" => {\n                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n                        \"title\": candidate.title,\n                        \"priority\": candidate.priority,\n                        \"downstream_impact\": candidate.downstream_impact,\n                        \"critical_float\": candidate.critical_float,\n                        \"assignee\": assignee,\n                        \"dry_run\": true\n                    });\n                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n                }\n                _ => {\n                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={})\", candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact);\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n        }\n    } else {\n        let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now())\n        })?;\n\n        match result {\n            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed }) => {\n                match format {\n                    \"json\" => {\n                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                            \"assignee\": assignee\n                        });\n                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n                    }\n                    _ => {\n                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            None => {\n                println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_sync(beads_dir: &PathBuf, flush_only: bool, import_only: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if import_only {\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Imported {} beads\", result.imported);\n    } else if flush_only {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Flushed {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    } else {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Synced {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_doctor(beads_dir: &PathBuf, repair: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n\n    if repair {\n        std::fs::remove_file(&db_path)?;\n        let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n        let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Repaired database: imported {} beads from JSONL\", result.imported);\n    } else {\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n        println!(\"Database is healthy: {} beads\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_count(beads_dir: &PathBuf, status: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = if let Some(s) = status {\n        let filter = IssueFilter {\n            status: Some(Status::from_str(&s).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?),\n            ..Default::default()\n        };\n        storage.list_issues(&filter)?.len()\n    } else {\n        storage.count_issues()?\n    };\n\n    println!(\"{}\", count);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_batch(beads_dir: &PathBuf, file: Option<PathBuf>, json: Option<String>, stdin: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let ops: Vec<BatchOp> = if let Some(json_str) = json {\n        serde_json::from_str(&json_str)?\n    } else if let Some(file_path) = file {\n        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&file_path)?;\n        serde_json::from_str(&content)?\n    } else if stdin {\n        parse_stdin()?\n    } else {\n        return Err(anyhow!(\"Must provide --file, --json, or --stdin\"));\n    };\n\n    let results = execute_batch(&storage, ops, beads_dir)?;\n\n    // Print results\n    for result in results {\n        if result.status == \"ok\" {\n            if let Some(id) = result.id {\n                println!(\"[op {}] ok: {}\", result.op, id);\n            } else {\n                println!(\"[op {}] ok\", result.op);\n            }\n        } else {\n
